content:
Given an undirected dynamic graph with the edges [(1, 2, 1), (1, 3, 1), (1, 2, 5), (3, 1, 6)], what nodes are linked with node 1 at time 1?
Answer: [2]

Given an undirected dynamic graph with the edges [(5, 7, 0), (6, 7, 0), (4, 6, 1), (2, 4, 2), (6, 9, 2), (1, 7, 3), (4, 9, 4), (2, 7, 6), (3, 9, 7), (7, 8, 7), (5, 6, 9)], what nodes are linked with node 3 at time 7?
Answer: [6, 9]
